ksa_text: Ability to design and deliver AI risk management and governance training programs for organizational personnel and external partners; build governance competency across the workforce.

STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). Domain AI Governance (affinity 0.45) is a natural fit for this governance role. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level level.
